name: get_daily_sleep
description: Retrieve daily sleep summaries for a date range. Each summary includes total sleep duration, efficiency percentage, sleep latency, restfulness, and an overall sleep score. Useful for tracking sleep quality trends over time.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to one day before end_date if omitted.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today if omitted.

parameters.name: next_token
parameters.description: Pagination token for retrieving the next page of results.
